tweet: shipped 31 PRs this week. added OpenAI-compatible image endpoints, wired up a bunch of new models (pruna, seraphyn, dirtberry), and optimized the seed upgrade job from 25 hours down to seconds. pollen also refills hourly now.
alt_tweet: shipped a new coat of paint and 31 PRs. you can now use OpenAI-compatible endpoints for image generation. seed tier upgrades take seconds instead of 25 hours. added hourly pollen refills and a pile of new models.
image_prompt: Cozy 8-bit pixel art scene of a retro RPG quest board. The cute pixel bee mascot (yellow body, dark stripes, pink blush, tiny wings, wearing a tiny adventurer's hat) is pinning up a glowing lime green (#ecf874) signboard. Large pixel font text on the main board reads 'Weekly Wrap'. Smaller retro UI wooden panels show text: 'OpenAI API', '25h -> Secs', 'Hourly Pollen'. Soft pastel background, mint to lavender gradient. Warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
reasoning: Leads with the concrete numbers and biggest architectural/UX wins (OpenAI compatibility, massive speedup, hourly refills) in a dry, matter-of-fact tone.
